name: spawn_subagent
description:
Spawn a sub-agent of a registered `subagent_type` (§10 delegation mode). The harness materialises a fresh §2.5 state machine with the type's `system_prompt_addendum`, `tool_allowlist`, `default_max_turns`, and optional `model_routing`. The sub-agent runs to completion and returns a single tool-result message; the parent never sees the sub-agent's intermediate turns. Cancellation cascades (cancelling the parent cancels its sub-agents). Recursion depth is capped at 3 (PROVISIONAL).

**Two invocation shapes:**
1. *Spawn:* `{description, prompt, subagent_type?, tool_allowlist?, max_turns?}` — `subagent_type` defaults to `general-purpose` per spec §10.1.
2. *Cancel:* `{subagent_id, cancel: true}` — terminates a running sub-agent; cascades to its descendants.

subagent_type.description: Name of a registered `schemas/config/subagent_type.v1.json` manifest (bundled, global, or per-repo). Optional; defaults to `general-purpose` per spec §10.1.

description.description: One-line summary shown in the parent's conversation card and the sub-agent pane title. Required when spawning.

prompt.description: The user-role message the sub-agent begins with. The sub-agent's `system_prompt_addendum` is automatically prepended; do not duplicate it here. Required when spawning.

max_turns.description: Override the sub-agent type's `default_max_turns` for this invocation. Subject to the global recursion-depth cap.

tool_allowlist.description: Override the sub-agent type's `tool_allowlist` for this invocation. If neither is set, the sub-agent inherits the parent's full tool set.

subagent_id.description: Identifier of an already-running sub-agent to cancel. Required iff `cancel: true`.

cancel.description: Set to `true` together with `subagent_id` to terminate a running sub-agent (§10.1, L552). Cancellation cascades to descendants.

subagent_id.description: Key into `session.subagents` where the sub-agent's full conversation and cost summary live.

result.description: The single final assistant message from the sub-agent. This is the only content injected back into the parent's conversation.

status.description: Terminal state of the sub-agent's §2.5 state machine. `running` never appears here — the tool only returns once the sub-agent has finished.

turns_used.description: Number of turns the sub-agent consumed. ≤ `max_turns` if set, else ≤ `subagent_type.default_max_turns`.

cost.description: Token + cost summary for the sub-agent. Mirrors the per-sub-agent entry in `session.subagents.*.cost_summary`.
